description: Resolves an entity's AABB against OTHER entities tagged solid — a crate, ledge, or moving lift becomes as solid as a tile: stops at their sides, lands on their tops, bonks their undersides, and writes the same contact flags as tilemap-collide (__onGround/__onCeiling/__onWallL/__onWallR), so move-platformer can jump off them and a vertical lift carries a resting entity. An entity tagged via oneWayTag is a one-way (pass-through) ledge — solid on its top face only (land from above, jump up through, drop through during the mover's drop-through window). Order it AFTER the velocity integrator; combine freely with tilemap-collide (the flags merge per tick). Swept sub-stepping keeps a fast body from tunnelling a thin solid up to a bounded speed. The entity-vs-entity counterpart to tilemap-collide.

solidTag.description: Tag marking fully-solid entities to resolve against (default "solid"); the entity carrying this behavior is skipped.

oneWayTag.description: Tag marking one-way (top-only) ledge entities (default "" = off).
